'''Slashtown''' was a prisoner colony on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Despayre]].

==Description==
Slashtown accommodated criminal convicts sentenced to the planet. It was located in Grid 4354, Sector 547 of Quadrant 3. The town consisted of huts built from wood and Imperial packing crates, held together with vines, wire, and twine.<ref name="DSn" />

==History==
In [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], Slashtown was home to several convicts including [[Celot Ratua Dil]], [[Balahteez]], [[Brun]], and [[Monn]]. One of the colony's guards, [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Nova Stihl]], taught a self-defense class for the residents and fellow guards.<ref name="DSn" />

The colony was destroyed when the Death Star fired upon the planet in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="DSn" />

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1st}}
